name: MikroTik hAP ac3
title: MikroTik hAP ac3
short_description: Dual-band 2.4/5 GHz, 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, 256 MB of RAM, 128 MB NAND, quad-core CPU, external high gain antennas
description: Dual-band 2.4/5 GHz, 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, 256 MB of RAM, 128 MB NAND, quad-core CPU, external high gain antennas

detailed_description.heading: Exceptional Wireless Coverage
detailed_description.text: Discover the MikroTik hAP ac3, a wireless dual-band router that redefines the standard for home access points. This advanced, yet comprehensive and affordable router is designed to deliver unparalleled performance, striking aesthetics, and unmatched versatility, making it the ideal choice for homes of varying sizes. One of the standout features of the hAP ac3 is its robust dual-chain dual-band 2.4/5 GHz wireless capabilities. This cutting-edge technology ensures a seamless and interference-free networking experience. The concurrent coverage of both frequency bands optimises overall performance and addresses the common challenges of interference in crowded environments. With this capability, the hAP ac3 allocates a dedicated 5 GHz channel for modern devices, offering a clutter-free and high-speed connection. Simultaneously, the 2.4 GHz channel remains steadfast, providing a reliable connection for older devices.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Hardware for Superior Performance
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik hAP ac3 features the IPQ-4019 chipset, a quad-core 716 MHz CPU, and 256 MB of RAM. The benefits of the IPQ-4019 chipset become apparent in its seamless integration with a quad-core 716 MHz CPU. This results in a robust processing unit capable of handling the most demanding networking tasks with ease. Whether you're setting up a secure VPN, enabling quality service features, or managing intricate firewall rules, the hAP ac3 powered by this chipset ensures a responsive and efficient experience. The inclusion of 128 MB of NAND and a USB-A 2.0 port takes the hAP ac3 to the next level, providing users with the flexibility to expand storage and enhance the device's overall capabilities. Users can conveniently expand storage capacity, allowing for the accommodation of additional configurations, backups, or other essential data. This feature is particularly beneficial for those seeking to customize their network environment or store multimedia content locally.

detailed_description.heading: Extensive Connectivity with PoE Support
detailed_description.text: Boasting five 1 Gbps Ethernet ports and a USB-A 2.0 port, this router opens up various connectivity options to cater to your diverse needs. The 1 Gbps Ethernet ports ensure lightning-fast wired connections, ideal for high-speed data transfers, gaming, and seamless streaming experiences. One standout feature of the hAP ac3 is its support for Power-over-Ethernet (PoE), introducing a new level of flexibility to your home network. With PoE capabilities on board, you can use the router to power other PoE-compatible devices, simplifying cable management and reducing clutter. Alternatively, the hAP ac3 can itself be powered by other PoE sources, offering convenient options for placement and installation. Imagine the convenience of a home network where devices seamlessly receive power through the Ethernet cable, eliminating the need for additional power sources. This feature is particularly advantageous for setting up network devices in locations where traditional power outlets are scarce or inconvenient.

detailed_description.heading: Efficient Network Control
detailed_description.text: Elevate your network management with the MikroTik hAP ac3, powered by RouterOS – a feature-rich operating system designed for maximum versatility. RouterOS offers secure VPNs for safeguarding your online activities and creates a secure online environment with parental controls. Moreover, experience accelerated security with IPsec hardware acceleration, enhancing the device's ability to handle secure data transmissions. Quality of Service (QoS) becomes a breeze as the hAP ac3 lets you prioritize specific types of network traffic. Streamline your internet usage by ensuring that critical applications receive the bandwidth they need, whether you're streaming content, participating in online meetings, or engaging in online gaming. Adding to its arsenal of features is the CAPsMAN tool, providing centralized management for all your MikroTik devices. Say goodbye to complex setups, as the hAP ac3 simplifies the management of multiple devices, ensuring a seamless and efficient networking experience.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Mounting Options
detailed_description.text: The hAP ac3 is designed for adaptability, featuring a new enclosure that allows users to mount the router either vertically or horizontally. The provided wall mount set ensures secure installation, catering to various preferences and spatial constraints.
